raw_consumer_statement:
Citi Bank sent me a billing with charges from XXXX in XXXX Texas on XX/XX/2023. 
on XXXX charges from XXXX XXXX and XXXX. In repeated recorded conversations I Denied each one of the charges totaling Appx {$6300.00} with Late charges. There were only two charges on the bill of {$1.00} from XXXX that were actually mine! In fact on XX/XX/2023 I sent a check for {$2600.00} paying off the total balance! I got a letter saying the cards EMV chip was used to make the disputed transactions and at a chip enabled card reader. You stated that the card was in your possession so we do not consider this fraudulent activity!

I believe they reported it to a credit agency. I got a call from my bank thats was concerned.I got a call from maybe a debt collector saying my score was reduced XXXX points! Other Bankers have told me that they would never have charged these unauthorized charges. I live in Florida and the charges stores in Texas. In fact one of the billings I received used my name and an address in Texas!! I am refusing to pay these charges and Citi-Card keeps trying to collect on the closed accounts. Do I need an attorney to stop this harassment and unethical behavior?
